# Subtraction Assignment

Subtraction assignment operator

```perl
$total -= $decrement;
```

## Expected Compilation Outcomes

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$total -= $decrement;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$total -= $decrement;
```
